1.description: Lehman Brothers CDS auction, first stage. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

2.description: Lehman Brothers CDS auction, second stage. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

3.description: CDS positions from Proposition4(left) and Proposition5(right). Parameters:vH=1,vL=0,λ=1,γ=1,π=0.5,c=1.2, andbis uniformly distributed on [ − 2, 2]. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

4.description: First-stage physical requests and second-stage allocations, given the CDS positions from Figure3. Parameters:vH=1,vL=0,λ=1,γ=1,π=0.5,c=1.2, andbis uniformly distributed on [ − 2, 2]. Left panels are from Proposition1(α=1), and right panels are from Proposition2. [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

5.description: Final auction prices (parameters as in Figure4). [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

6.description: Total allocations in two stages (parameters as in Figure4). [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]
